# Pitch Deck Airbnb (2009)

AI-enhanced description

Airbnb offers a platform for booking accommodations with locals as an alternative to hotels, addressing customer desires for cultural connection and cost-effectiveness. The document outlines the challenges in the short-term rental market, alongside Airbnb's business model which includes a 10% commission on bookings. It also presents market validation metrics, competitive advantages, and promotional strategies targeting major events.

[Business](https://www.slideshare.net/category/business)◦

Related topics:

[Pitch Deck Insights](https://www.slideshare.net/tag/pitch-deck)•

AirBed&Breakfast
Book rooms with locals, rather than hotels.
1
This is a PowerPoint reproduction of an early AirBnB pitch deck via Business Insider @
http://www.businessinsider.com/airbnb-a-13-billion-dollar-startups-first-ever-pitch-deck-2011-9

Study Suggests Lyrics Have Gotten Simpler Over Time

![Image 29: Problem 2
Price is an important concern for customers
booking travel online.
Hotels leave you disconnected from the city
and its culture.
No easy way exists to book a room with a local
or become a host.
Template by PitchDeckCoach.com
 ](https://image.slidesharecdn.com/primeiropitchdeckdoairbnb2009-170302022531/85/Pitch-Deck-Airbnb-2009-2-320.jpg)![Image 30](https://image.slidesharecdn.com/primeiropitchdeckdoairbnb2009-170302022531/75/Pitch-Deck-Airbnb-2009-2-2048.jpg)

![Image 31: Solution 3
A web platform where users can rent out their
space to host travelers to:
SAVE
MONEYwhen traveling
MAKE
MONEYwhen hosting
SHARE
CULTURElocal connection to the city
Template by PitchDeckCoach.com
 ](https://image.slidesharecdn.com/primeiropitchdeckdoairbnb2009-170302022531/85/Pitch-Deck-Airbnb-2009-3-320.jpg)![Image 32](https://image.slidesharecdn.com/primeiropitchdeckdoairbnb2009-170302022531/75/Pitch-Deck-Airbnb-2009-3-2048.jpg)

AVG FEE

REVENUE
2008-2011
10.6M $20 $200M

## Pitch Deck Airbnb (2009)

*   1. [Welcome AirBed&Breakfast Book rooms with](https://www.slideshare.net/slideshow/pitch-deck-airbnb-2009/72719483#1)locals, rather than hotels. 1 This is a PowerPoint reproduction of an early AirBnB pitch deck via Business Insider @ http://www.businessinsider.com/airbnb-a-13-billion-dollar-startups-first-ever-pitch-deck-2011-9  
*   2. [Problem 2 Price is](https://www.slideshare.net/slideshow/pitch-deck-airbnb-2009/72719483#2)an important concern for customers booking travel online. Hotels leave you disconnected from the city and its culture. No easy way exists to book a room with a local or become a host. Template by PitchDeckCoach.com  
*   3. [Solution 3 A web](https://www.slideshare.net/slideshow/pitch-deck-airbnb-2009/72719483#3)platform where users can rent out their space to host travelers to: SAVE MONEYwhen traveling MAKE MONEYwhen hosting SHARE CULTURElocal connection to the city Template by PitchDeckCoach.com  
*   4. [Market Validation 4 630,000 on](https://www.slideshare.net/slideshow/pitch-deck-airbnb-2009/72719483#4)temporary housing site couchsurfing.com 17,000 temporary housing listings on SF & NYC Craigslist from 07/09 – 07/16 Template by PitchDeckCoach.com  
*   5. [Market Size 5 1.9](https://www.slideshare.net/slideshow/pitch-deck-airbnb-2009/72719483#5)Billion+ TRIPS BOOKED (WORDLWIDE) Total Available Market 532M BUDGET & ONLINE TRIPS Serviceable Available Market 10.6M TRIPS W/AB&B Market Share Template by PitchDeckCoach.com  
*   6. [Product 6 REVIEW LISTINGS Template](https://www.slideshare.net/slideshow/pitch-deck-airbnb-2009/72719483#6)by PitchDeckCoach.com SEARCH BY CITY BOOK IT!  
*   7. [Business Model 7 Template](https://www.slideshare.net/slideshow/pitch-deck-airbnb-2009/72719483#7)by PitchDeckCoach.com We take a 10% commission on each transaction. TRIPS W/AB&B Share of Market AVG FEE $70/night @ 3 nights REVENUE 2008-2011 10.6M $20 $200M  
*   8. [Market Adoption 8 Template](https://www.slideshare.net/slideshow/pitch-deck-airbnb-2009/72719483#8)by PitchDeckCoach.com EVENTS target events monthly PARTNERSHIPS cheap/alternative travel CRAIGSLIST dual posting feature Octoberfest (6M) Cebit (700,000) Summerfest (1M) Eurocup(3M+) Mardi Gras (800,000) with listing widget Widget screenshot AirBnB screenshot Craigslist screenshot  
*   9. [Competition 9 Template by](https://www.slideshare.net/slideshow/pitch-deck-airbnb-2009/72719483#9)PitchDeckCoach.com AFFORDABLE EXPENSIVE ONLINE TRANSACTIONOFFLINE TRANSACTION  
*   10. [Competitive Advantages 10 Template](https://www.slideshare.net/slideshow/pitch-deck-airbnb-2009/72719483#10)by PitchDeckCoach.com 1st TO MARKET HOST INCENTIVE Lorem ipsum dolor sit amet, consectetur adipiscing elit. Integer nec odio. Praesent libero. Lorem ipsum dolor sit amet, consectetur adipiscing elit. Integer nec odio. Praesent libero. Lorem ipsum dolor sit amet, consectetur adipiscing elit. Integer nec odio. Praesent libero. LIST ONCE EASE OF USE PROFILES Lorem ipsum dolor sit amet, consectetur adipiscing elit. Integer nec odio. Praesent libero. Lorem ipsum dolor sit amet, consectetur adipiscing elit. Integer nec odio. Praesent libero. Lorem ipsum dolor sit amet, consectetur adipiscing elit. Integer nec odio. Praesent libero. DESIGN & BRAND  
*   11. [If you liked](https://www.slideshare.net/slideshow/pitch-deck-airbnb-2009/72719483#11)this, you’ll love our Pitch Deck Coach template. Click below. http://www.slideshare.net/PitchDeckCoach/t he-ultimate-pitch-deck-template-by- pitchdeckcoach  
*   12. [Did you enjoy](https://www.slideshare.net/slideshow/pitch-deck-airbnb-2009/72719483#12)this deck? Read my blog post on “The Pitch Deck” http://pitchdeckcoach.com/pitch-deck
